title: Tokyo Revengers 2: Bloody Halloween - Destiny
original_title: 東京リベンジャーズ2 血のハロウィン編 -運命-
overview: Hinata is murdered again by the Tokyo Manjikai Gang in front of Takemichi. In order to save Hinata, Takemichi travels 10 years back in time again. Takemichi has to change a key case that can save Hinata. The key case involves a sad incident that occurred to 6 men, who later formed the Tokyo Manjikai Gang.
